description_long: This object consists of two pumpkins, one of which is whole and the other is broken into several large pieces, revealing the interior. The pumpkins have a classic round, ribbed shape with a short, brown stem on top. The broken pumpkin displays jagged, irregular fragments scattered around, exposing a lighter orange interior that contrasts with the darker orange exterior. The surface of the pumpkins appears matte and slightly rough, typical of natural pumpkin skin. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories present. The object is depicted against a plain, white background, making the placement location unclear.
description: Two pumpkins, one whole and one broken into large pieces, with a matte orange surface and visible stems.
description_view_0: A view showing the whole pumpkin in the background and the broken pumpkin in the foreground with scattered fragments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the separation between the whole pumpkin and the broken pieces, with the interior of the broken pumpkin visible.
description_view_2: A rear angle showing the whole pumpkin in front and the broken pumpkin with fragments behind it.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective displaying both pumpkins side by side, emphasizing the scattered nature of the broken pieces.
